scripts.dev: BB_RUNTIME_MODE=development BB_ROOT=${BB_ROOT:-$HOME/.bb-dev} BB_SERVER_PORT=${BB_SERVER_PORT:-3334} BB_APP_PORT=${BB_APP_PORT:-5173} turbo run dev --ui tui --concurrency 20
scripts.start: BB_RUNTIME_MODE=production pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@bb/app --filter=@bb/server --filter=@bb/cli && node apps/server/dist/index.js
scripts.qa:providers:dynamic-tools: BB_E2E_PROVIDER_MODE=real pnpm --filter @bb/server exec vitest run --config vitest.e2e.fast.config.ts src/__tests__/e2e/dynamic-tools-server-roundtrip.test.ts
scripts.qa:cli:smoke: BB_E2E_PROVIDER_MODE=real pnpm --filter @bb/server exec vitest run --config vitest.e2e.fast.config.ts src/__tests__/e2e/thread-spawn-roundtrip.test.ts src/__tests__/e2e/thread-archive-unarchive-roundtrip.test.ts
scripts.qa:env-daemon:core: BB_E2E_PROVIDER_MODE=real pnpm --filter @bb/server exec vitest run --config vitest.e2e.fast.config.ts src/__tests__/e2e/thread-shared-environment-roundtrip.test.ts src/__tests__/e2e/thread-multi-thread-stress.test.ts
scripts.qa:environments:core: BB_E2E_PROVIDER_MODE=real pnpm --filter @bb/server exec vitest run --config vitest.e2e.fast.config.ts src/__tests__/e2e/thread-worktree-followup-roundtrip.test.ts src/__tests__/e2e/thread-worktree-primary-checkout-roundtrip.test.ts src/__tests__/e2e/thread-shared-environment-roundtrip.test.ts
